posts.author: siva
posts.text: Zerodha Kite App features requests — Not sure if it is easy to provide all data points on app itself, there is no space to include all at once. Guess in-front of monitor then user can check on sensibul web. But let me pass this as feedback to our team, maybe if possible to do something about this.

posts.author: Amey1
posts.text: Zerodha Kite App features requests — Currently zerodha Kite App has few features in option chain. Only shows OI, Greeks, Calls & put LTP for all strikez. Now if an trader wants to look all strikes IV + IV Chg, PCR + CHG, BID / ASK Rate, qty, vol, change, breakeven then either navigate to 3rd party website - sensibull NSE, or navigate NSE APP Now even sensibull APP do not show IV, only shows IV change, & other few details for all strikes For e. G. Now if an trader is doing trading from mobile using split screen or using 2 mobiles or if he is in front of monitor & tracking then he needs to navig…
